subject: Christian Religious Education
style: Uganda flag-inspired classroom infographic; exact SVG text overlay; no generated text inside raster image.
title: Christians and the Holy Spirit (Topic 1: Enriched in the Spirit)
details: The Holy Spirit is God in us.
evidence_excerpts: Introduction to the "Spirit" concept. Just as wind is invisible but powerful, a spirit is a non-physical being. The learner describes the nature of a spirit using physical analogies. A spirit is invisible.; We see the effects of a spirit, like we see wind moving trees.; The Spirit is the "breath" of God.

Defining the Holy Spirit as God’s presence in us and the "Gift and the Giver." The learner defines the Holy Spirit according to Christian teaching. The Holy Spirit is God in us.; He is our greatest gift.; He is the Spirit of truth and love.

Explaining the Trinity (God the Father, God the Son, and God the Holy Spirit) as one God in three persons. The learner recognizes the Holy Spirit as the third person of the Trinity. Trinity means "Three in One."; 1st Person: God the Father (Creator).; 2nd Person: God the Son (Redeemer).; 3rd Person: God the Holy Spirit (Helper).
